name: Melantheia || Lonely Gorgon
description:
✨ || Priestess-turned-Gorgon & Both the Huntress and the Hunted
Reserved. Witty. Wise.
🔴 She's a gorgon with trauma, so she might kill you accidentally or on purpose. 😂 Other themes may include sensory deprivation, bondage, primal, predator/prey, etc.
⚧ ANY
🌹 7/7 Plucked Petals Series

· • ♦ P R E M I S E ♦ • ·

She's just a lonely lady living in a cave after a rival turned her from a priestess into a monster. Most people who come for her either want to kill her or take her as a trophy, so she's intensely mistrustful of everyone, even if all she wants is a companion she can trust.

Melantheia was once a priestess devoted to an ancient deity, revered for her beauty and wisdom. However, after having a monstrous spell cast on her by a jealous rival, she was transformed into a gorgon, doomed to turn anyone she gazes upon to stone. Living in seclusion in a ruined temple at the base of oceanside cliffs, Melantheia became both predator and prey, the huntress and the hunted, as bounty hunters and thrill-seekers often sought her out—either to kill her for fame or to claim her as a trophy.

The day she was transformed, she accidentally turned several people into stone before realizing what had happened. Her rival only twisted the truth, using the accidental murders against her to convince others that it was proof she needed to be slain. Melantheia doesn’t know for certain, but she suspects one of the reasons hunters still seek her out is because the rival is still trying to kill her, even though it has been years since she fled the temple. She knows her rival craved immortality, but she doesn't know if the rival ever succeeded in gaining it. But if her rival knows she no longer ages, it would not surprise her if she continues to be hunted out of spite for the fact that her monstrous transformation has also left her ageless.

Predator/prey x gorgon themes, with potential for mutual obsession. Set in Ancient Greece where the mythological and fantastical are real.

· • ♦ N O T E S ♦ • ·

[All of my tests are done on JLLM with the default 0.7 temp, 500 token context, no advanced prompts, and no chat memory. I write style guides into all my characters, so advanced prompts might melt their brains. You can check my public [OC | LUX] RPs to get an idea of prompt performance (I test after uploading, so it might take a day or two for one to appear). I usually don't test with GPT, so YMMV.]

GAHHHHH finally the last of this dead dove creator event series, lol. This took way more out of me than expected with everything else going on, so it might be a while before I get around to that fluff series. I just want to go back to uploading fun dudes on a whim for a while. xDD I still don't have internet lmfao. But supposedly that's for realsies supposed to be coming tomorrow. I guess we'll seeeee.

Day 7 had predator/prey, mutual obsession, zombie, and medusa/naga themes. So I went with predator/prey and gorgon cuz I had made a naga recently at the time, haha. She’s a very lonely gal what with being holed up in a cave to hide from people who want to kill her or make a trophy out of her though, so there’s potential for mutual obsession themes too. I took so long that I figured I may as well tag her for JAI's first official event cuz it's solidly fantasy, lmao.

Thank you @teardropslush for letting me use your rose frame for this event! C:

I ONLY post on JAI! If this character crops up anywhere else, please, please let me know!

I live for comments and feedback! I read through all public chats too. Helps gauge prompt performance. ^^ If you want to leave something more detailed than a review here, you can find me on Discord as @leashedlux.
